query: How do I reset my password?
expected_answer: To reset your password, go to Settings > Security > Reset Password and follow the email instructions.
actual_answer: I don't have information about password reset procedures.

query: What is the refund policy for annual subscriptions?
expected_answer: Annual subscriptions are eligible for a full refund within 30 days of purchase.

query: How can I export my data in CSV format?
expected_answer: Go to Dashboard > Settings > Data Export and select CSV format. The export will be emailed to you.
actual_answer: Data export functionality is available in the settings menu.

query: What are the API rate limits for the free tier?
expected_answer: Free tier accounts are limited to 100 API calls per day and 10 requests per minute.
actual_answer: I cannot find specific rate limit information for free tier users.

query: How do I integrate with Slack notifications?
expected_answer: Navigate to Integrations > Slack and click 'Add to Slack'. You will need workspace admin permissions.
actual_answer: Slack integration is available under the Integrations section.
